characters.name: Bogies
characters.description: Bogiesare a group of little people who work/serve as spies for both the dark fairyMiderand Temra'sQueen Maeve.  The Bogies are able to blend in with the environment. They can also disappear and reappear at will, allowing them to quickly report to Queen Maeve.

characters.name: Dragon
characters.description: Dragonsare large, winged reptiles in the world ofMystic Knights. They are capable of flight and levitation, fire-breathing and have immense strength and durability. Only three dragons have ever been encountered within the series, though it has been implied that there are more. The first wasPyre, the Dragon of Dare, an ally to theMystic Knights. Second to appear wasTyrune, a three-headed hydra-type dragon affiliated withTemraand rival of Pyre. And the third and last known dragon was called aDrageen, a recently-hatched baby dragon.
characters.media_title: Mystic Knights of Tir Na Nog

characters.name: Liam
characters.description: Liam was to have been the Mystic Knight of Lightning, a new character that would have been introduced in the second season of Mystic Knights, entitledMystic Knights: Battle Thunder. Following the news that actorVincent Walshwould be leaving the show after the first season, the decision was made to promoteGarrettinto the position of Mystic Knight of Earth followingAngus's departure. As a result, it became necessary to create a new character to fill the position of Mystic Knight of Lightning, which would have originally gone to Garrett had Walsh not left the show. The name Liam, and concept artwork for the Mystic Knight of Lightning's armor and weapons, were revealed in internal documents from toy company Bandai. No other information about Liam is known at this time.
